articles.title: Yahoo Finance
articles.content: “We got rid of our HR team.”. For most executives, that’s a sentence likely to provoke intense anxiety. But for Bolt CEO Ryan Breslow, it was unavoidable. “Those problems disappeared when I let them go.”.
